extract: Oricorio (Japanese: オドリドリ Odoridori) is a Flying-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Oricorio can change forms by sipping the Nectar of certain flowers. If Red Nectar is used on Oricorio, it will change into Baile Style, where it becomes dual-type Fire/Flying. If Yellow Nectar is used on Oricorio, it will change into Pom-Pom Style, where it becomes dual-type Electric/Flying. If Pink Nectar is used on Oricorio, it will change into Pa'u Style, where it becomes dual-type Psychic/Flying. If Purple Nectar is used on Oricorio, it will change into Sensu Style, where it becomes dual-type Ghost/Flying.
